@graph.name: Business Valuation in Maharashtra | Virtual Auditor
@graph.description: Business Valuation in Maharashtra. From ₹50,000. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. IBBI-compliant business valuation using DCF, market approach. Contact +91 99622 60

mainEntity.name: What is an IBBI Registered Valuer?

acceptedAnswer.text: A professional registered with IBBI under the Registered Valuers Regulations, 2017. Required for valuations under Companies Act and IBC.

mainEntity.name: How many valuation methods do you use?

acceptedAnswer.text: We use up to 18 methods with 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations per engagement for statistically defensible results.

mainEntity.name: How long does a valuation report take?

acceptedAnswer.text: Standard reports in 7-10 working days. Complex multi-framework valuations may take 15-20 days.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide business valuation services in Maharashtra?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Maharashtra from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Maharashtra?

acceptedAnswer.text: Companies registered in Maharashtra fall under ROC Mumbai. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Maharashtra-registered companies.

mainEntity.name: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Maharashtra?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stamp duty in Maharashtra: 0.15-0.25% on authorised capital. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
